title: dbus-broker bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[36-4]
- Change dbus user GECOS to avoid warning

[36-3]
- Add sysusers.d config file to allow rpm to create users/groups
  automatically

[36-2]
- Add patch to fix sockopt in kernel 6.16
full_text:
[36-4]
- Change dbus user GECOS to avoid warning

[36-3]
- Add sysusers.d config file to allow rpm to create users/groups
  automatically

[36-2]
- Add patch to fix sockopt in kernel 6.16

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20218-0.html
